codeReview.summary: The fix commit e7e63b6 successfully added 'extending-8bit-16bit' to the examples array for l7-s8 in lectures.json. VAL-CONTENT-001 (l7-s8 has at least one example) now PASSES. However, VAL-CONTENT-006 (all L7 sections must have at least 2 assessment items) still FAILS for multiple sections.

issues.description: VAL-CONTENT-006 still fails. L7 sections with only 1 assessment item: l7-s4 (Parameter Passing) has QB-062 only; l7-s6 (Arrays) has QB-063 only; l7-s7 (Reading/Printing) has QB-064 only. L7 sections with 0 assessment items: l7-s3 (Procedures) and l7-s5 (Recursion) have empty assessmentItems arrays.

summary: Fix adequately addresses the blocking issue. The extending-8bit-16bit example is now properly linked to l7-s8 in lectures.json. VAL-CONTENT-001 now passes. The remaining VAL-CONTENT-006 failures (sections with only 1 or 0 assessment items) are pre-existing issues not addressed by this fix commit, which only addressed the l7-s8 example linking issue.
